(July 22, 2026, unread): Microsoft-provided SMS/voice authentication retires February 1, 2027 - action: migrate to passkey-based authentication before that date. ⚡ Based on your inbox, here is the summary of the key action items and recommended next steps regarding the undeliverable email and the passkeys notification. ### **1. Undeliverable Email: Q4 Resource Allocation** * **Issue:** Your email sent to `sarah.jenkins@sockcop.onmicrosoft.com` was not delivered because the recipient was not found in the directory. * **Key Details:** The system reported "Recipient Unknown," suggesting the email address is either misspelled or the account does not exist. * **Recommended Next Steps:** * **Verify Address:** Check the Global Address List (GAL) or contact Sarah through another channel to confirm her correct email address. * **Resend:** Once the address is verified, open the Non-Delivery Report (NDR) in Outlook and select **Send Again** to correct the recipient field. ### **2. Passkeys Notice: Authentication Retirement** * **Issue:** Microsoft has announced that SMS and voice-based authentication will be retired on **February 1, 2027**. Passkeys are becoming the default authentication experience for Microsoft Entra ID. * **Key Details:** This is a tenant-wide change requiring a shift toward phishing-resistant authentication. * **Recommended Next Steps:** * **Assessment:** Review current user authentication methods in the Entra ID admin center to see how many users still rely on SMS or voice. * **Planning:** Develop a migration strategy to transition users to passkeys or the Microsoft Authenticator app well before the 2027 deadline to ensure security compliance. ### **Summary Table of Priorities** | Action Item | Deadline | Impact | Priority | | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | | Resolve Undeliverable Email | Immediate | Communication Gap | High | | Plan Passkeys Migration | Feb 1, 2027 | Security Compliance | Medium | | Renew App Credentials* | Immediate | Service Interruption | High | *\*Note: Your inbox also contains an urgent alert regarding an AzureAD app client secret (App ID 7868d053...) that is nearing expiration, which may require your immediate attention to prevent service downtime.* 🌐 According to your connected Microsoft 365 Outlook Assistant (admin@sockcop.onmicrosoft.com): 1) 'Undeliverable: Q4 Resource Allocation' (July 22, 2026): the email to sarah.jenkins@sockcop.onmicrosoft.com bounced with error 550 5.1.10 because the recipient wasn't found - action: verify the correct email address and resend. 2) 'Passkeys by default...' (July 22, 2026, unread): Microsoft-provided SMS/voice authentication retires February 1, 2027 - action: migrate to passkey-based authentication before that date. 🔬 Multi-Intent Gap: Why Gemini MCP Scored 50% on Q097

In Q097, the user query asked for "Executive briefing on inbox alerts and calendar schedule".

• Gemini MCP (50% Score): Invoked only tool_list_meetings and returned the 2 Teams meetings, but omitted the inbox alerts (Passkeys & Azure Copilot).
• StreamAssist (100% Score): Federated Search simultaneously queried both the email and calendar connectors, retrieving both.
